    <item>
      <title>Celtics stay ice-cold from three-point range in Game 6 loss to 76ers</title>
      <description>For the last few seasons, the Boston Celtics have built an elite offense by overwhelming opponents with three-point shooting and ball movement. When the shots aren't falling, like they weren't in Thursday's Game 6 loss, that offense looks very ordinary. </description>
      <pubDate>01 May 2026 00:01:01 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/celtics_stay_ice_cold_from_three_point_range_in_game_6_loss_to_76ers/s1_13132_43792558</link>

        <media:credit> Bill Streicher-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Boston Celtics guard Jaylen Brown (7) drives against Philadelphia 76ers guard Tyrese Maxey (0) during the second quarter at Xfinity Mobile Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>

      <title>Skip Bayless calls LeBron James' GOAT case 'laughable'</title>

    <item>
      <title>Tempers flare in Knicks-Hawks Game 6 blowout as multiple players are ejected</title>
      <description>Facing elimination at home down 3-2 in their first-round series, the Atlanta Hawks didn't show much fight. Until guard Dyson Daniels started an actual fight after the game was out of hand. </description>

        <media:credit> Brett Davis-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> New York Knicks center Mitchell Robinson scuffles with Atlanta Hawks guard Dyson Daniels as forward Onyeka Okongwu and guard Nickeil Alexander-Walker attempt to hold them back in the second quarter during game six of the first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at State Farm Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
